title: Scientific Notation Converter
description: Converts numbers between decimal and scientific notation with precision control, error analysis, and industrial-grade validation. Compliant with ISO 80000-1 and NIST SP 811.

inputs.label: Input Number
inputs.businessContext: The numeric value to be converted. Accepts any real number within double-precision floating-point range.

inputs.label: Conversion Direction
inputs.businessContext: Select whether to convert from decimal to scientific notation or from scientific notation to decimal.

inputs.label: Significant Digits
inputs.businessContext: Number of significant digits in the scientific notation output. Follows ISO 80000-1 rounding rules.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the decimal output. Used when converting from scientific to decimal.

inputs.label: Engineering Notation
inputs.businessContext: If true, exponent is forced to a multiple of 3 for engineering applications (IEC 60027).

inputs.label: Use Epsilon Threshold
inputs.businessContext: If true, numbers below machine epsilon (2.22e-16) are flagged as potential underflow.

rules.message: Significant digits must be between 1 and 15.
Decimal places must be between 0 and 15.
Input number must be a finite real number.
Engineering notation requires exponent to be a multiple of 3. Adjust significant digits or disable engineering notation.

thresholds.alert: Input number is below machine epsilon. Result may be affected by floating-point underflow.
Input number exceeds double-precision range. Result will be Infinity.
High significant digit count may introduce rounding errors beyond typical measurement precision.

formulas.name: Absolute Value
formulas.description: Absolute value of the input number for exponent calculation.

formulas.name: Exponent Calculation
formulas.description: Base-10 exponent of the absolute value. For zero, exponent is set to 0.

formulas.name: Mantissa Calculation
formulas.description: Mantissa (coefficient) rounded to the specified number of significant digits.

formulas.name: Engineering Notation Adjustment
formulas.description: If engineering notation is enabled, adjust exponent to nearest multiple of 3 and shift mantissa accordingly.
formulas.formula: if (engineeringNotation && conversionDirection === 'toScientific') { let remainder = exponent % 3; if (remainder < 0) remainder += 3; exponent = exponent - remainder; mantissa = mantissa * Math.pow(10, remainder); mantissa = parseFloat(mantissa.toPrecision(significantDigits)); }

formulas.name: Sign Handling
formulas.description: Apply the sign of the original number to the mantissa.

formulas.name: Scientific Notation String
formulas.description: Construct the scientific notation string: signedMantissa × 10^exponent.

formulas.name: Decimal Conversion
formulas.description: If conversion direction is to decimal, compute the decimal value from scientific notation input. Assumes inputNumber is in scientific notation format (e.g., 1.23e4).

primary.label: Converted Value
primary.description: The primary result: either the scientific notation string or the decimal number, depending on conversion direction.

mantissa.label: Mantissa (Coefficient)
mantissa.description: The coefficient part of the scientific notation.

exponent.label: Exponent
exponent.description: The exponent part of the scientific notation.

significantDigitsUsed.label: Significant Digits Used
significantDigitsUsed.description: Actual number of significant digits in the mantissa.

engineeringNotationFlag.label: Engineering Notation Applied
engineeringNotationFlag.description: Indicates whether engineering notation was applied.

decimalValue.label: Decimal Value
decimalValue.description: The decimal representation of the input number.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Rounding Error
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Potential loss of precision due to rounding to significant digits.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Underflow Risk
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Indicator if input is near machine epsilon and may cause underflow.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Overflow Risk
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Indicator if input exceeds safe double-precision range.

suggestedActions.label: Increase Significant Digits
suggestedActions.description: If rounding error is significant, increase the number of significant digits up to 15.

suggestedActions.label: Disable Engineering Notation
suggestedActions.description: If engineering notation causes exponent adjustment that reduces precision, consider disabling it.

suggestedActions.label: Check Input Scale
suggestedActions.description: If underflow or overflow risk is detected, verify the input number scale for measurement errors.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Adjusted
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Confidence score (0-1) adjusted for precision and risk factors. 1 = high confidence, 0 = no confidence.
